since_last: 31% of 84 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +1.14%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 31% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.73% · BTC -1.80% · Gold +0.22% · Nasdaq100 -2.36%. 31% of 84 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +1.14%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +1.14%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -6.79%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: TER is the standout at -13.20%
cards.body: Leaders: WDAY +4.91%, NET +4.78%, INTU +3.38%, CRM +2.83%, ADBE +2.81%. Laggards: TER -13.20%, INTC -11.19%, AMAT -10.57%, MRVL -10.35%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -5.77% at $151.17
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -5.77% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
